batch_label: QC — pre-release Name normalization + orphan-ref cleanup
reason: Pre-release QC pass (qc_release.md rev 1). Whole-backend scan found no corruption. Mechanical fixes only: (1) unify drifting builder labels in 'Builder (Owner N)' placeholder Names across three yards (B1), (2) add the missing ordinal + canonical owner form to one Hanwha placeholder (B2/B3), (3) drop two orphan [ref]s whose paired value is blank (Rule F). All Name edits are cosmetic/derived (preserve_ref:true — paired [ref] documents the order, not the literal string). Canonical forms confirmed with user 2026-06-18: Hudong-Zhonghua (drop 'Shanghai'); HD Hyundai Samho (drop 'Yeongam', drop 'HI'); HD Hyundai HI (HHI) Ulsan (keep '(HHI)').
